rationale: The three beads compose into one coherent feature with no half-wiring. Ordering: bead 1's `.claude/workflows/**` claim (68c87106) merged before bead 2 landed ms-panel.js there — the ADR-0036 same-diff-or-earlier invariant holds, and TestWorkflowOwnsClaudeWorkflows pins attribution (passes). Args contract: bead 3's dispatch tuple {slug, spec, target, bead_id?, round, lenses[], mix, claude_sub_on_quota} exactly matches the workflow's consumed args (sha is optional/advisory and safely omitted); the round-1 claude_sub_on_quota drift is fixed (1fd29af9), and the fail-closed absent→false semantics are stated identically in ms-panel-run SKILL.md, runbook.md, interfaces.md, and the code (`args.claude_sub_on_quota === true`). Doc-sync is bead-unique and consistent: bead 1→architecture.md, bead 2→interfaces.md (full args+hardening+ladder contract, honestly noting claude_sub_on_quota extends R1's illustrative tuple), bead 3→runbook.md. Install wiring: installWorkflows is called only from RunClaude; codex.go/copilot.go untouched. All three mirror pairs (workflow, ms-panel-run, ms-panel-tally) are byte-identical by shasum. Superseded skill sections are gated and labelled, not deleted; all tally judgment sections survive. validate/setup/plugins tests pass.
findings: Bead ordering verified: ownership claim (9cyu.1, 68c87106) merged before the workflow artifact (9cyu.2, 1ad0d796); the claim covers exactly the artifact bead 2 landed, and plugins/mindspec/workflows/** resolves through the pre-existing plugins/mindspec/** glob as the spec states.

Runner-dispatch arg tuple matches the workflow args contract field-for-field including claude_sub_on_quota (the round-1 drift finding is fixed); fail-closed omitted-flag semantics agree across skill, workflow code, runbook, and interfaces.md.
Doc-sync: each bead appended a distinct workflow-domain doc region (architecture.md / interfaces.md / runbook.md) and the args tuple is stated consistently in all of them.
Byte-identity: shasum-equal pairs for ms-panel.js (embed vs installed), ms-panel-run SKILL.md, and ms-panel-tally SKILL.md mirrors.
Install is Claude-target-only: the sole installWorkflows call sits in RunClaude; TestClaudeSetup_InstallsWorkflowClaudeTargetOnly passes.

Minor, non-blocking: flattenMix maps lenses via `lenses[index % lenses.length]`, silently wrapping if the skill passes fewer lenses than mix slots — a leniency, not drift, since the skill composes one lens per slot; a length mismatch could arguably warn instead.
